trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Primary signal is the cross-exchange spread discount on Binance, which typically attracts arbitrage buying. Combined with bullish trend structure, this provides a 3-signal confluence.

Signals are contradictory; while the trend is technically up, SOL lacks the aggressive smart money backing seen in BTC or the clear technical exhaustion seen in ETH. Risk-to-reward is currently poor compared to peers.

results.cross_asset_insight: ETH/BTC ratio indicates risk-on appetite, but ETH's volume divergence and smart money outflows suggest alpha is rotating back to BTC. BTC is the primary beneficiary of a short-squeeze regime due to extreme negative retail sentiment (L/S 0.63).
